summary: Implement Wave 4 assessment infrastructure for automated model management: model assessor with real benchmark execution (HumanEval, MBPP, latency) and metrics collector for 4-pillar metrics (accuracy, latency, cost, robustness) with SQLite persistence and z-score normalization.
notes: Validated with bun test in packages/opencode-model-manager: 215 tests passing (204 Waves 1-3 + 11 Wave 4). Model assessor executes real benchmarks with timeout enforcement. Metrics collector implements 4-pillar metrics with SQLite persistence.
